domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: Up to 10% of SI, covered after 3 days

organ_donor_expenses.limit_text: Up to ₹50,000 for 3 Lacs plan, Up to ₹1,00,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan

ambulance_cover.limit_text: Up to ₹1,500 per hospitalization for 3 Lacs plan, Up to ₹2,000 per hospitalization for 5,7,10 Lacs plan

restoration_benefit.limit_text: Yes to SI (Once in a Policy Year)

room_rent_capping: 1% SI per day (Max. up to 1% of SI per day) for 3 Lacs plan, Single Private AC Room (Max. up to 1% of SI per day) for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
copayment_trigger_notes: If your age is 61 years or more, we provide you an option to choose for co-payment of 20% per claim (over & above any other co-payment, If any) which applies to you. We pay the rest.

disease_wise_sub_limits.Cataract: ₹20,000 per eye for 3 Lacs plan, ₹30,000 per eye for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Total Knee Replacement: ₹80,000 per knee for 3 Lacs plan, ₹1,00,000 per knee for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Hernia: ₹50,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹65,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Hysterectomy: ₹50,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹65,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Benign Prostate Hypertrophy (BPH): ₹50,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹65,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Stones of renal system: ₹50,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹65,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Cerebrovascular and Cardiovasular disord: ₹2,00,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹2,50,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Cancer: ₹2,00,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹2,50,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Other renal complications and Disorders: ₹2,00,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹2,50,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
disease_wise_sub_limits.Breakage of bones: ₹2,00,000 for 3 Lacs plan, ₹2,50,000 for 5,7,10 Lacs plan
